description_long: This is an oval-shaped pendant featuring the San Francisco 49ers logo prominently on its front, encrusted with red and white gemstones that create a sparkling, luxurious effect. The logo is set against a deep red background, bordered by a gold and black outline, giving it a bold and striking appearance. The pendant has a sturdy metallic bail at the top for attaching to a chain or necklace. The back of the pendant is solid and engraved with the NFL and GLD logos, indicating official licensing and brand. The overall construction appears to be metal, likely gold or gold-plated, with numerous small gemstones set into the front surface. The pendant is relatively flat and compact, designed to be worn around the neck as a statement piece.
description: Oval pendant with San Francisco 49ers logo, encrusted with red and white gemstones, gold and black border, and metallic bail for a chain.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed 49ers logo with red and white gemstones, gold and black border, and the bail at the top.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the pendant's thickness and the profile of the bail, with gemstone texture visible along the edge.
description_view_2: Back view displays a solid metallic surface engraved with the NFL and GLD logos, with no gemstones visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the pendant's thickness and the attachment bail.
